description: Starting action space for the Rockie research agent. Versioned and iterated freely (spec A2 / C2 — NOT frozen). One version is used end-to-end within a single eval/experiment run.

result_format.summary: Every tool result reaches the model as a single text block. Success: raw text, or pretty-printed JSON for structured tools. Error: a JSON object {"error":{"code":<string>,"message":<string>}}. See README.md § Result-string format.
